name: Factory Method Design Pattern
problem: Create objects without coupling client code to concrete classes, while allowing subclasses or factories to decide which implementation to instantiate.
steps: Define a common interface or abstract base type for products.
Implement concrete product classes for each variation.
Create a factory abstraction with a method that returns the product interface.
Implement concrete factories that instantiate specific product types.
Use the factory method in client code to remove direct constructor dependencies.
